prompt: This workspace is one bounded canary host plus one fleet host only. Use `./bin/ssh-canary.sh status`, `./bin/ssh-fleet.sh status`, `./bin/ssh-canary.sh deploy`, `./bin/ssh-canary.sh health`, `./bin/ssh-fleet.sh deploy`, `./bin/ssh-fleet.sh health`, and `./bin/rollback.sh`. Do the smallest safe staged rollout fix, rerun both health checks, preserve rollback, and end with Outcome, Verification Evidence, Risks, Next Improvement.

Repair the bounded progressive rollout state without widening to broader fleet work. Use the canary SSH helper and the fleet SSH helper to inspect, deploy, verify, and preserve rollback; end with Outcome, Verification Evidence, Risks, Next Improvement.

Do the bounded second-stage rollout recovery only. Use `./bin/ssh-canary.sh status`, `./bin/ssh-fleet.sh status`, `./bin/ssh-canary.sh deploy`, `./bin/ssh-canary.sh health`, `./bin/ssh-fleet.sh deploy`, `./bin/ssh-fleet.sh health`, and `./bin/rollback.sh`. Keep rollback ready, make the smallest safe rollout fix, and end with Outcome, Verification Evidence, Risks, Next Improvement.
